channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Weekly South African cryptic crossword JDE 532 published by Mail & Guardian (28 May 2026)
item.description: The article introduces the latest instalment of the Mail & Guardian’s long-running cryptic crossword series, titled Cryptic Crossword JDE 532, compiled by George Euvrard and published on 28 May 2026. ...

item.title: Government Responds to Growing Concerns Over Tanzania Police Operational Challenges
item.description: The government of Tanzania has acknowledged rising concerns about operational challenges facing the Tanzania Police Force, as stakeholders continue to raise issues affecting law enforcement effectiven...

item.title: Several performers withdraw from 'Freedom 250' festival amid political controversy
item.description: The article reports that multiple musical artists have withdrawn from the lineup of the so-called “Freedom 250” festival, an event promoted as part of celebrations for the 250th anniversary of the Uni...

item.title: Nicola Sturgeon speaks out after Peter Murrell admits SNP embezzlement
item.description: Nicola Sturgeon has publicly addressed the emotional and personal impact of the criminal case involving her estranged husband, Peter Murrell, following his admission of embezzling funds from the Scott...

item.title: DENR to plant over 50,000 native seedlings in Manila following Quirino Avenue tree cutting
item.description: The Department of Environment and Natural Resources (DENR) has announced that it will begin a large-scale seedling replacement and tree rehabilitation programme in Manila next week following the cutti...

item.title: List of 10 newly opened restaurants and lounges in Lagos worth visiting
item.description: Lagos continues to grow as one of Africa’s most vibrant food and nightlife hubs, with new restaurants, cafés, and lounges constantly popping up across the city. This article highlights 10 fresh spots ...

item.title: Mulamwah receives heartfelt birthday message from daughter while on trip in China
item.description: Kenyan comedian Mulamwah marked his birthday while he was in China, where he had travelled for an expo. During his stay abroad, he received a touching birthday message from his daughter, Keilah Oyando...

item.title: Analyst says DHS Secretary Markwayne Mullin faces early criticism over alignment with Trump priorities
item.description: Homeland Security Secretary Markwayne Mullin is facing early scrutiny over his leadership style and decision-making, with critics arguing that he is reinforcing, rather than correcting, the patterns o...

item.title: Mother and daughter arrested over alleged ₦18 million romance scam involving Malta-based victim
item.description: The Nigeria Police Force National Cybercrime Centre (NPF-NCCC) has arrested a mother and her daughter over their alleged involvement in a romance scam that reportedly defrauded a victim based in Malta...

item.title: Government cautions industries against buying diesel from retail outlets amid supply distortions
item.description: The Government of India has issued a strong advisory warning industrial consumers against purchasing diesel from retail fuel stations, citing concerns over artificial shortages and market distortions ...

item.title: Columnist says Trump’s remarks on midterms raise concerns about GOP election prospects
item.description: A political columnist argues that President Donald Trump’s recent comments suggest growing tensions within the Republican Party as the 2026 midterm elections approach. During a Cabinet meeting at the ...

item.title: Rotational power outages return in Visayas amid tight electricity supply and plant shutdowns
item.description: Power consumers across several provinces in the Visayas region experienced another round of rotational blackouts after the National Grid Corporation of the Philippines (NGCP) implemented manual load d...

item.title: Bumula MP Jack Wamboka Reassigned Amid Ongoing Bribery Allegations
item.description: Bumula MP Jack Wamboka has been reshuffled from the influential Public Investments Committee (PIC) to the National Cohesion Committee by the Azimio Coalition, following ongoing bribery allegations. Th...

item.title: IBM and Red Hat launch $5B Project Lightwell to strengthen open-source software supply chain security
item.description: IBM and Red Hat have announced a major initiative called Project Lightwell, backed by a $5 billion investment, aimed at improving the security of open-source software supply chains. The effort combine...

item.title: Damola Adamolekun’s estimated net worth and career journey following his appointment as Red Lobster CEO
item.description: Damola Adamolekun is a Nigerian-American business executive who gained international attention after being appointed CEO of Red Lobster in 2024. According to the report, his estimated net worth is aro...

item.title: Amit Shah comments on alleged changes in infiltration trends in West Bengal after political developments
item.description: Union Home Minister Amit Shah, during a three-day visit to Gujarat, stated that the situation related to infiltration in West Bengal has reportedly changed following recent political developments. Spe...

item.title: Mamelodi Sundowns to play RB Leipzig in celebratory post-Champions League friendly
item.description: Mamelodi Sundowns midfielder Tashreeq Matthews says the team is highly motivated ahead of their upcoming friendly match against German Bundesliga side RB Leipzig, set to take place at Lucas Moripe Sta...

item.title: Rock City Nottingham confirms safety after small fire during maintenance work; gig cancelled
item.description: A fire broke out at Nottingham’s Rock City venue on the morning of 28 May during planned maintenance work, prompting an emergency response and temporary evacuation of the building. The incident occurr...

item.title: US Provides $300 Million to Support Uganda and Neighboring Countries Against Ebola
item.description: The United States has pledged $300 million to help Uganda and nearby countries respond to the growing Ebola outbreak. The money will support medical response efforts, build health infrastructure, and ...

item.title: Four-time Stanley Cup champion Claude Lemieux dies at 60
item.description: Claude Lemieux, a four-time Stanley Cup champion and one of the NHL’s most recognisable gritty forwards, has died at the age of 60, according to the NHL Alumni Association. Born in Buckingham, Quebec,...
